title: disconnected record set
text: disconnected record set A package of data that represents a group of occurrences of a Uniface entity (optionally including any inner entities). A disconnected record set contains processing information that allows the disconnected data to be reconnected to its source. They are typically used for communication between Web components and are usually implemented as XML data streams. Related Links Disconnected Record Sets Disconnected record sets provide a way for components to maintain and share data and its state (such as whether the data has been modified) even when a connection to a database is not available. They are typically used for communication between web components (server pages and web services) and are usually implemented as XML, JSON, or Uniface Structs. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
